case_title: WILLIAM SCOT VS. JOHN VALDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY SEET, WILLIAM VALDEZ, JOHN (DBA) SOMA LUXURY PROPERTY, INC. VALDEZ, JOHN DBA COMMUNITY DESPENSARY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,577.47 FILED BY SEET, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, JOHN (DBA) SOMA LUXURY PROPERTY, INC. VALDEZ, JOHN DBA COMMUNITY DESPENSARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, JOHN (DBA) SOMA LUXURY PROPERTY, INC.
ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. AT THE REQUEST OF PARTIES PER ORDER SIGNED SEPT. 12, 2016 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO SEP-12-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM SEET. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS JOHN VALDEZ, DBA SOMA LUXURY PROPERTY, INC. OR JOHN VALDEZ, DBA COMMUNITY DESPENSARY. SUSTITUTE SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS MAILED ON JULY 18, 2016 (TWENTY-TWO DAYS AGO) TO AN ADDRESS OUTSIDE SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITHCELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AFTER PARTICIPATING IN A MEDIATION SESSION CONDUCTED BY STUDENTS FROM HASTINGS SCHOOL OF LAW. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM SEET AND DEFENDANTS JOHN VALDEZ, DBA SOMA LUXURY PROPERTY, INC. AND JOHN VALDEZ, DBA COMMUNITY DISPENSARY. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON 10/19/16. JUDGE: PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, JOHN DBA COMMUNITY DESPENSARY

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-19-2016 AT 3:30 PM. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION ON SEPT. 12, 2016. PER THE MINUTES OF SEPT. 12, 2016, PARTIES REQUEST TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY AT THE CALLING OF OCT. 19, 2016 HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
